name: test_app
description: A curated library of minimal web applications serving as test targets for a Playwright-based testing framework.

scripts.install:all: for dir in apps/vanilla-html apps/react-app apps/vue-app apps/angular-app apps/svelte-app apps/nextjs-app apps/lit-app; do echo "Installing $dir..." && (cd $dir && npm install); done
scripts.start:all: npm run generate-shared && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm start --prefix apps/vanilla-html" "npm start --prefix apps/react-app" "npm start --prefix apps/vue-app" "npm start --prefix apps/angular-app" "npm start --prefix apps/svelte-app" "npm start --prefix apps/nextjs-app" "npm start --prefix apps/lit-app"
